heading: Omitted
label: 19aa to 19gg Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 19aa to 19gg were omitted pursuant to section 19gg which provided that all authorities contained in this subchapter expired .Sept. 30, 1989Section 19aa, , , , defined terms for purposes of this subchapter.Pub. L. 97–433, § 296 Stat. 2277Jan. 8, 1983Section 19bb, , , , established in United States Treasury the National Park System Visitor Facilities Fund and provided for funds to be credited to that Fund.Pub. L. 97–433, § 396 Stat. 2277Jan. 8, 1983Section 19cc, , , , authorized appropriations to be made available to National Park Foundation to carry out its functions under this subchapter.Pub. L. 97–433, § 496 Stat. 2277Jan. 8, 1983Section 19dd, , , , related to administration of Fund projects and required Foundation to include in its annual report a description of projects undertaken and accomplishments made under this subchapter.Pub. L. 97–433, § 596 Stat. 2278Jan. 8, 1983Section 19ee, , , , related to authority of National Park Foundation.Pub. L. 97–433, § 696 Stat. 2278Jan. 8, 1983Section 19ff, , , , provided that nothing in this subchapter affect responsibilities of Secretary of the Interior under other provisions of law.Pub. L. 97–433, § 796 Stat. 2279Jan. 8, 1983Section 19gg, , , , provided that authorities contained in this subchapter expire , and that any moneys credited to Fund not appropriated, expended, or obligated be transferred to miscellaneous receipts of the Treasury.Pub. L. 97–433, § 896 Stat. 2279Jan. 8, 1983Sept. 30, 1989
Short Titleprovided that this subchapter be cited as the “National Park System Visitor Facilities Fund Act”.Section 1 of Pub. L. 97–433
